welcomeEmail.name: Welcome Email
welcomeEmail.subject: Welcome to Mount Sinai Fertility – Referral Received
welcomeEmail.body:
Hello,

We have received your referral from your referring physician or nurse practitioner. Before we can process it, please confirm the information below to ensure your file is accurate and complete.

1. Please confirm your email address – Kindly reply to confirm that this is the correct email for you.

2. Your personal information – Please provide the following:

  • Complete Last, First Name:
  • Date of Birth (MM/DD/YYYY):
  • Address (include unit number, if applicable):
  • Phone Number:
  • Email:
  • Ontario Health Card Number + Version Code (up to date):

If you do NOT have OHIP – Please attach:

  • Valid government photo ID (Passport or Driver's Licence)
  • Out-of-province health card (if applicable)

Please note: Out-of-province patients will be subject to fees. These will be reviewed with you by the MD admin when scheduling your appointment.

If you have UHIP – Please attach:

  • A copy of your UHIP card
  • A government photo ID

3. Partner information (if applicable) – If you have a partner, please provide the following. If you do not have a partner, kindly indicate this.

  • Complete Last, First Name:
  • Date of Birth (MM/DD/YYYY):
  • Address (include unit number, if applicable):
  • Phone Number:
  • Email:
  • Ontario Health Card Number + Version Code:

If your partner does NOT have OHIP – Please attach:

  • Valid government photo ID
  • Out-of-province health card (if applicable)

Note: Out-of-province fees apply as above.

4. Emergency contact information – As per hospital policy, we require emergency contact information for you (and your partner, if applicable). If your partner will be your emergency contact, simply indicate this, and you do not need to complete the section below.

Patient Emergency Contact

  • Relationship to Patient:
  • Last, First Name:
  • Phone Number:
  • Address (include unit number if applicable):

Partner Emergency Contact (if applicable)

  • Relationship to Patient:
  • Last, First Name:
  • Phone Number:
  • Address (include unit number if applicable):

Next steps – Once we receive the above information, your referral will be processed and forwarded to one of our MD administrative coordinators. They will contact you directly to schedule your appointment.

Thank you for taking the time to provide this information,
{{signature}}

reminder.name: Reminder
reminder.subject: Friendly Reminder – Referral Information Needed
reminder.body:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well. This is a gentle reminder that we are still missing the information needed to complete your referral to Mount Sinai Fertility.

When you have a moment, please reply with the requested details so we can process your referral and forward it to our MD administrative team for appointment scheduling.

If you have already sent this information, please disregard this message.

Thank you,
{{signature}}

partialInfoReminder.name: Partial Information Reminder
partialInfoReminder.subject: Friendly Reminder – Additional Information Needed to Complete Your Referral
partialInfoReminder.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your response. We have received some of the information needed to complete your referral to Mount Sinai Fertility. To move forward, we still require the remaining details listed in our previous email.

When you have a moment, please send the outstanding information so we can process your referral and forward it to our MD administrative team for appointment scheduling.

If you believe you already sent everything, please let us know, and we will be happy to double-check.

Thank you,
{{signature}}
